title: Vijetha
overview: Srinivasa Rao, who is a talented photographer sacrifices his passion and keeps his family before everything. But his son Ram doesn’t understand this and keeps wasting time by chilling with his friends. An unexpected twist creates a massive rift between the father and son. Rest of the story is as to how Ram becomes responsible in life and wins his father’s respect back.
